name: grant-proposal
description: Write a structured nonprofit grant proposal outline that clearly communicates need, program design, impact metrics, and budget justification.
input_description: Organization name and mission, grant funder name, project name, problem statement, proposed program or project, target population, expected outcomes, and budget range.
output_description: Complete grant proposal outline in Markdown with Executive Summary, Organization Background, Problem Statement, Program Description, Goals and Objectives, Evaluation Plan, Budget Narrative, and Conclusion.
